app.//comment: number_of_threads = Drogon I/O event-loop threads. CPU-bound image work runs on the separate worker pool below.
app.//upload_path: Writable temp dir for multipart parsing. Uploads under client_max_memory_body_size stay in RAM and are never written here; nothing is persisted.

custom_config.//comment: Image worker pool. workers=0 means auto (hardware concurrency).

security.//comment: api_keys empty => auth disabled. When set, /v1/process requires X-API-Key (or Authorization: Bearer <key>).

rate_limit.//comment: Per-client token bucket (keyed by API key, else IP). enabled=false => no limiting.

cors.//comment: Allowed CORS origins. ["*"] allows any origin.

processing.//comment: Per-request processing deadline (queue wait + compute), ms. 0 => disabled.
